DeathPhilosophy: Hardcore PvP and PvE Death. All deaths carry identical, meaningful, and unified hardcore consequences with zero mechanical divergence.

CarriedCurrencyRiskRule.Text: Only currency physically carried by the character is subject to death loss.

BankSecurityRule.Text: Currency stored in the character bank is fully protected from all death penalties.

LossFormula.Description: Blessing protection is linear. 7 active blessings grant full 100% protection against item loss (for both PvP and PvE deaths). Any PvP or PvE death removes ALL active blessings simultaneously (regardless of count).

ProtectionTable.7_Blessings: 100% protection (Zero loss of equipped, backpack, loot, or currency)

LossFormula.BlessingConsumptionLaw: Any PvP or PvE death removes ALL active blessings simultaneously.

PlayerCorpseLootLaw.CanonicalRule: Items dropped upon player death (regardless of PvP or PvE origin) become accessible to any player capable of reaching the corpse.
